lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It is currently not operational and requires major mechanical repairs.
Poor condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and drives exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor, with every detail meticulously preserved. From its flawless exterior to its pristine interior, this car is a rare find that truly represents the pinnacle of care and maintenance. Ready for a new owner who appreciates perfection!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the upholstery. The car is functional, though it may require some mechanical attention soon.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The engine currently suffers from a significant oil leak and produces a noticeable knocking sound when under load. Additionally, the transmission shifts very roughly and frequently slips between gears. On the exterior, there are several large dents, significant rust spots on the rear wheel wells, and the clear coat is peeling on the hood. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be safely roadworthy again.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a slipping transmission and a persistent engine misfire. The body shows extensive wear with multiple large dents, heavy rust on the door sills, and failing clear coat. Inside, the cabin requires a deep clean and repair, as there are significant tears in the upholstery and the air conditioning is non-functional. This car is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Experience a sophisticated driving dynamic backed by a history of responsible ownership.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It's the perfect reliable daily driver that still looks great pulling into any parking lot. It runs super smoothly and is totally ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant. This 3.2L inline-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimized volumetric efficiency across the rev range. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock
Reliable daily driver. Engine runs strong. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Service records available.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and presents beautifully both inside and out. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like finish, with only minor road-pebble chips on the front valence typical of careful highway use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the leather seats are supple and free of cracks, and every power feature—from the panoramic sunroof to the premium infotainment system—operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It shifts smoothly, brakes confidently, and the engine remains quiet and responsive. While there is a small, superficial scuff on the rear passenger-side wheel rim, the overall integrity of the car is outstanding. This is a smoke-free, garage-kept example that represents a fantastic value for a discerning buyer looking for quality without the new-car price tag.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional servicing, the automobile retains its structural soundness and operational excellence. The interior and exterior finishes remain in commendable condition, reflecting a legacy of attentive ownership. We invite you to acquire this dependable asset, which offers a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional long-term value.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a premier balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence. It represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream—perfect for anyone looking for a solid, reliable set of wheels that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken really good care of it, so it's ready for many more adventures with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving peak, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with its signature individual throttle bodies and a double-VANOS system that has been meticulously maintained for optimal valve timing. Power is routed through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from proactive rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension setup that preserves the car's celebrated handling geometry. With a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline and a robust cooling system, this vehicle is dialed in for the enthusiast who prioritizes drivetrain integrity and tactile performance.
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. No issues.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, impressive condition. The exterior retains its deep luster, though a few minor stone chips on the hood reflect its honest road history. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and remarkably clean; the leather seats are supple with only minimal softening on the driver’s side. All technological features, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, operate flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is sound, having received consistent oil changes and recent brake service. It drives straight and shifts smoothly, offering a confident experience for its next owner. Complete with a clean title and a full service history, this is a well-cared-for example ready for the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Exhibiting a consistent history of professional care, the unit remains in commendable condition, both mechanically and aesthetically. Its refined road manners and documented upkeep ensure a driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional offering.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous professional inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic state. A distinguished choice for the driver who prioritizes consistent maintenance and proven reliability, this vehicle stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been well-loved and is ready for its next big adventure? This car is in really great shape and has been such a joy to drive! It’s super clean, runs like a dream, and is just waiting for someone new to take it out on the open road. It’s been well-maintained and definitely has plenty of miles of fun left in it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis is structurally sound, benefiting from documented rear subframe reinforcement and a recently serviced VANOS system to ensure optimal variable valve timing. Power is delivered via the factory variable M differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical traction. While exhibiting minor cosmetic patina consistent with its history, the vehicle remains mechanically sharp, offering a linear power band and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline that defines the peak of naturally aspirated engineering.
Reliable used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regularly maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This automobile retains its structural and aesthetic appeal, offering a balanced combination of performance and longevity. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate acquisition, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains a premier choice for the sophisticated driver.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been absolutely wonderful to own. It's in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I've taken good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with a torque-sensing limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Significant preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS service. The chassis dynamics remain sharp, supported by a well-sorted suspension setup that maintains excellent lateral composure. While showing honest wear consistent with its condition, the mechanical vitals are robust, providing a tactile, analog driving experience that thrives at its 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regularly maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. All systems functional.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior retains its factory luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful use, while the alloy wheels remain free of any significant curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium upholstery is supple and clean, and every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule with all service records fully documented. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and robust acceleration. This car has been garage-kept and non-smoker owned, offering a reliable and sophisticated driving experience for its next owner. It is a standout choice for any discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with the utmost care.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies the ideal balance of performance and refined aesthetics. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent reliability. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated daily operator that remains in commendable condition.
